chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-1000 of 2022 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of main case. 08.08.2025. Mr. Sandeep Malani, AAG Mr. Naseer Ahmed and Ms. Rahmatunisa, advocates for KDA ------------------------------ This is an old petition of 2022. It was last taken up on 21.03.2022, which is also over 03 years ago, when a counsel held brief on behalf of learned counsel for the petitioners and since then learned counsel for the petitioners has made no serious efforts to have this petition fixed for hearing. Today, once again, none is present on behalf of the petitioners without intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith all pending applications, if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
